series.title: The Amazing Digital Circus
series.desc: The Amazing Digital Circus is a psychological dark comedy...

episodes.title: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS - Ep 2: Candy Carrier Chaos!
episodes.desc: The gang are BACK for a WAaAaAaACKY candy filled adventure! They also discover that their lives literally have no meaning. Woohoo! So waaccky!!!!!

episodes.title: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS - Ep 3: The Mystery Of Mildenhall Manor
episodes.desc: The gang are back together to go on their next SPOOKY adventure. Kinger gets a shotgun! Zooble goes to therapy! Pomni goes to hell! So much fun awaits!!!!!

episodes.title: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS - Ep 4: Fast Food Masquerade
episodes.desc: Pomni and friends spend an honest day’s hard work at popular fast food chain; Spudsy’s! Keep an eye out though, Gangle is the manager and has a brand new mask… it’s like she’s a whole NEW person!

episodes.title: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS - Ep 5: Untitled
episodes.desc: We aren't actually sure what this episode is about.
